dialogue.A: Hi, what can I get for you?

dialogue.B: Can I get a medium latte, please?

dialogue.A: Sure! Would you like that hot or iced?

dialogue.B: Iced, please. And can I add an extra shot?

dialogue.A: Of course. Name for the order?

dialogue.B: It's Joshua. Thanks!

translation.A: 你好，请问要点什么？

translation.B: 我要一杯中杯拿铁，谢谢。

translation.A: 好的！你要热的还是冰的？

translation.B: 冰的，谢谢。可以多加一份浓缩吗？

translation.A: 当然可以。请问怎么称呼？

translation.B: Joshua，谢谢！

key_phrases: Can I get a ~, please? = 我要一个～（点单万能句）
Would you like ~ hot or iced? = 你要热的还是冰的？
Can I add ~? = 可以加～吗？
tip: 点单时说 'Can I get' 比 'I want' 更礼貌自然。
examples: Can I get a window seat, please?（我要一个靠窗座位）
Can I add oat milk instead?（可以换燕麦奶吗）
Would you like that for here or to go?（在这吃还是带走？）

dialogue.A: Thank you for calling Olive Garden. How can I help you?

dialogue.B: Hi, I'd like to make a reservation for two, please.

dialogue.A: Sure! What date and time were you thinking?

dialogue.B: This Saturday at 7 PM.

dialogue.A: Perfect. Can I get your name and phone number?

dialogue.B: It's Joshua Song, and my number is 301-555-0192.

translation.A: 感谢致电Olive Garden，请问有什么可以帮您？

translation.B: 你好，我想预订两人座位。

translation.A: 好的！您考虑哪天几点？

translation.B: 本周六晚上7点。

translation.A: 好的。请问您的姓名和电话？

translation.B: Joshua Song，电话301-555-0192。

key_phrases: I'd like to make a reservation for ~ = 我想预订～人的位置
What date and time were you thinking? = 您考虑哪天几点？
Can I get your name? = 请问您的姓名？
tip: 'I'd like to' 比 'I want to' 更有礼貌，打电话订位时常用。
examples: I'd like to make a reservation for four.（我想订四人位）
What time were you thinking for dinner?（你想几点吃晚饭？）
Can I get your phone number?（请问您的电话？）

dialogue.A: Excuse me, is there a pharmacy nearby?

dialogue.B: Yes! There's a CVS about two blocks down on your right.

dialogue.A: Two blocks down and turn right?

dialogue.B: No, just go straight — it's on the right side of the street.

dialogue.A: Got it. How long does it take to walk?

dialogue.B: Maybe five minutes.

translation.A: 打扰一下，附近有药店吗？

translation.B: 有！前面两个街区右手边有一家CVS。

translation.A: 走两个街区然后右转？

translation.B: 不，直走就行，在街道右侧。

translation.A: 明白了，走路大概要多久？

translation.B: 大概5分钟。

key_phrases: Excuse me, is there a ~ nearby? = 打扰一下，附近有～吗？
Two blocks down = 往前两个街区
On your right/left = 在你右/左手边
tip: 问路时先说 'Excuse me' 是基本礼貌，美国人很乐意帮忙。
examples: Excuse me, is there a gas station nearby?（附近有加油站吗？）
Go straight for three blocks, then turn left.（直走三个街区然后左转）
It's on your left, next to the bank.（在你左手边，银行旁边）

dialogue.A: Did you find everything okay today?

dialogue.B: Almost — I couldn't find the almond milk.

dialogue.A: It's in aisle 7, next to the regular milk.

dialogue.B: Oh great, thanks! Also, do you have any coupons for this?

dialogue.A: Let me check... Yes, there's a 20% off deal in the app.

dialogue.B: Perfect, I'll use that. Thanks so much!

translation.A: 今天找到所有东西了吗？

translation.B: 差不多，但杏仁奶没找到。

translation.A: 在第7排，普通牛奶旁边。

translation.B: 太好了，谢谢！这个有优惠券吗？

translation.A: 我看看……app里有个八折优惠。

translation.B: 完美，我用那个，太感谢了！

key_phrases: Did you find everything okay? = 您找到所有东西了吗？（收银员常说）
I couldn't find ~ = 我找不到～
It's in aisle ~ = 在第～排
tip: 在美国超市，收银员常问 'Did you find everything okay?' 回答 'Yes, thanks!' 就够了。
examples: Did you find everything okay today?（今天找到所有东西了吗？）
I couldn't find the pasta sauce.（我找不到意面酱）
It's in aisle 3, near the back.（在第3排，靠近里面）

dialogue.A: What brings you in today?

dialogue.B: I've had a sore throat and a fever since yesterday.

dialogue.A: Any coughing or trouble swallowing?

dialogue.B: Some coughing, but swallowing is okay.

dialogue.A: Let me take a look. Open wide and say 'Ahh'.

dialogue.B: Ahh...

translation.A: 今天来看什么问题？

translation.B: 我从昨天开始喉咙痛、发烧。

translation.A: 有咳嗽或者吞咽困难吗？

translation.B: 有点咳嗽，但吞咽没问题。

translation.A: 我来看一下，嘴巴张开说'啊'。

key_phrases: What brings you in today? = 您今天来看什么？（医生常用开场白）
I've had ~ since ~ = 我从～开始就有～
Any ~ ? = 有没有～？（医生问症状）
tip: 描述症状时用 'I've had + 症状 + since + 时间' 结构非常清晰。
examples: I've had a headache since this morning.（我从今早就头痛）
Any nausea or dizziness?（有恶心或头晕吗？）
I've had this rash since last week.（我从上周就有这个疹子）

dialogue.A: Hello, this is Sarah from ABC Company. May I speak with Joshua?

dialogue.B: This is Joshua speaking.

dialogue.A: Hi Joshua! I'm calling about the proposal you sent over.

dialogue.B: Of course. Is there anything you'd like to clarify?

dialogue.A: Yes, could you walk me through the pricing section?

dialogue.B: Sure, happy to. So the base price is...

translation.A: 您好，我是ABC公司的Sarah，请问Joshua在吗？

translation.B: 我就是Joshua。

translation.A: Joshua你好！我是关于你发来的方案打电话的。

translation.B: 当然，有什么需要说明的吗？

translation.A: 是的，你能带我过一遍定价部分吗？

translation.B: 当然，很乐意。基础价格是……

key_phrases: This is ~ speaking = 我就是～（接电话报名字）
I'm calling about ~ = 我打电话是关于～
Could you walk me through ~? = 你能带我过一遍～吗？
tip: 接电话说 'This is Joshua speaking' 比 'I am Joshua' 更专业地道。
examples: This is Sarah speaking, how can I help?（我是Sarah，有什么可以帮您？）
I'm calling about your job application.（我打电话是关于您的求职申请）
Could you walk me through the timeline?（你能带我过一遍时间线吗？）

dialogue.A: Boarding pass and ID, please.

dialogue.B: Here you go.

dialogue.A: Please remove your shoes and place all items in the bin.

dialogue.B: Can I leave my laptop in my bag?

dialogue.A: No, laptops need to go in a separate bin.

dialogue.B: Got it, sorry about that.

translation.A: 请出示登机牌和证件。

translation.B: 给您。

translation.A: 请脱鞋，所有物品放进筐里。

translation.B: 我的笔记本可以放在包里吗？

translation.A: 不行，笔记本需要单独放一个筐。

translation.B: 明白了，不好意思。

key_phrases: Here you go = 给您（递东西时说）
Place all items in the bin = 把所有物品放进筐里
Sorry about that = 不好意思（轻微道歉）
tip: 'Here you go' 是递东西给别人时最自然的说法，比 'Here it is' 更常用。
examples: Here you go, have a great flight!（给您，祝飞行愉快！）
Please place all liquids in a separate bin.（请把所有液体单独放一个筐）
Sorry about that, I'll fix it right away.（不好意思，我马上解决）

dialogue.A: Welcome! Do you have a reservation?

dialogue.B: Yes, under the name Joshua Song.

dialogue.A: Let me pull that up... Got it! King room, two nights?

dialogue.B: That's right. Is early check-in available?

dialogue.A: Your room is actually ready. I'll just need a credit card for incidentals.

dialogue.B: Sure, here's my Visa.

translation.A: 欢迎！请问有预订吗？

translation.B: 有，名字是Joshua Song。

translation.A: 我查一下……找到了！大床房，住两晚？

translation.B: 对的。可以提前入住吗？

translation.A: 您的房间已经准备好了。我需要一张信用卡作为押金。

translation.B: 好的，这是我的Visa卡。

key_phrases: Under the name ~ = 名字是～（报预订名字）
Let me pull that up = 我来查一下（查记录常用）
For incidentals = 作为押金/杂费保证
tip: 酒店check-in时常被要求提供信用卡 'for incidentals'，就是以防万一的押金，退房时退还。
examples: Reservation under the name Johnson.（预订名字是Johnson）
Let me pull up your account.（我来调出您的账户）
We'll need a card for incidentals.（我们需要一张卡作为押金）

dialogue.A: Hi, I have a reservation. Last name Song.

dialogue.B: Got it! You reserved a mid-size sedan for three days.

dialogue.A: That's right. Does it come with GPS?

dialogue.B: It has Apple CarPlay and Android Auto built in.

dialogue.A: Great. Do I need to return it with a full tank?

dialogue.B: Yes, or we charge a refueling fee.

translation.A: 你好，我有预订，姓Song。

translation.B: 找到了！您预订了一辆中型轿车，租三天。

translation.A: 对。车上有导航吗？

translation.B: 内置了Apple CarPlay和Android Auto。

translation.A: 好的。还车时需要加满油吗？

translation.B: 需要，否则我们会收加油费。

key_phrases: Does it come with ~? = 它带有～吗？
Built in = 内置的
Return it with a full tank = 加满油还车
tip: 租车还车前记得加满油，否则租车公司加的油费比加油站贵很多。
examples: Does it come with insurance?（包含保险吗？）
It has a built-in backup camera.（内置倒车摄像头）
Do I need to return it with a full tank?（还车需要加满油吗？）

dialogue.A: Alright, let's get started. Thanks everyone for joining.

dialogue.B: Before we begin, can we get a quick update from the dev team?

dialogue.A: Sure. We're on track to launch by Friday.

dialogue.B: That's great to hear. Any blockers?

dialogue.A: Just one — we're waiting on the final design assets.

dialogue.B: I'll follow up with the design team right after this.

translation.A: 好了，我们开始吧。感谢大家参加。

translation.B: 开始之前，可以先听开发团队的进度更新吗？

translation.A: 当然。我们预计周五可以按时上线。

translation.B: 很高兴听到这个。有什么阻碍吗？

translation.A: 就一个——我们在等最终的设计素材。

translation.B: 会议结束后我马上跟设计团队跟进。

key_phrases: Let's get started = 我们开始吧
On track to ~ = 预计按时～
Any blockers? = 有什么阻碍吗？（开发团队常用）
tip: 'Any blockers?' 是科技公司会议中超高频的问法，意思是有没有什么卡住进度的问题。
examples: Let's get started — we have a lot to cover.（我们开始吧，有很多要讲）
We're on track for the Q3 launch.（我们Q3上线进度正常）
Any blockers from the design side?（设计那边有什么阻碍吗？）

dialogue.A: Hi, how can I help you today?

dialogue.B: I'd like to open a checking account.

dialogue.A: Of course. Do you have a government-issued ID with you?

dialogue.B: Yes, I have my passport.

dialogue.A: Perfect. And will this be an individual or joint account?

dialogue.B: Individual, just for me.

translation.A: 你好，请问今天有什么可以帮您？

translation.B: 我想开一个支票账户。

translation.A: 当然。您带了政府颁发的证件吗？

translation.B: 有，我带了护照。

translation.A: 好的。这是个人账户还是联名账户？

translation.B: 个人账户，只有我自己的。

key_phrases: I'd like to open a ~ account = 我想开一个～账户
Government-issued ID = 政府颁发的证件
Individual vs joint account = 个人账户 vs 联名账户
tip: 在美国银行开户通常需要护照或驾照 + 社会安全号（SSN）或ITIN。
examples: I'd like to open a savings account.（我想开一个储蓄账户）
Do you have a government-issued ID?（您有政府颁发的证件吗？）
Will this be individual or joint?（这是个人还是联名账户？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm here to pick up a prescription.

dialogue.B: Last name?

dialogue.A: Song, S-O-N-G.

dialogue.B: Date of birth?

dialogue.A: April 5th, 1986.

dialogue.B: Got it. Your copay is $10 today.

translation.A: 你好，我来取药。

translation.B: 请问贵姓？

translation.A: Song，S-O-N-G。

translation.B: 出生日期？
好的。今天您需要支付10美元自付额。

key_phrases: I'm here to pick up a prescription = 我来取处方药
Copay = 自付额（保险后自己付的部分）
Spelling out your name = 拼出姓名字母（容易混淆时用）
tip: 美国药店取药需要报姓名和出生日期来核实身份，不需要出示证件。
examples: I'm here to pick up a prescription for Song.（我来取Song的处方药）
Your copay today is $25.（今天您的自付额是25美元）
Date of birth, please?（请问出生日期？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I don't think we've met. I'm David.

dialogue.B: Hey David, I'm Joshua. Nice to meet you!

dialogue.A: Nice to meet you too. How do you know the host?

dialogue.B: We went to college together. What about you?

dialogue.A: We're coworkers. Have you been to one of these before?

dialogue.B: First time! It's a great place.

translation.A: 你好，我们好像还没见过，我是David。

translation.B: David你好，我是Joshua，很高兴认识你！

translation.A: 我也是，你和主人是怎么认识的？

translation.B: 我们是大学同学，你呢？

translation.A: 我们是同事。你以前来过这里吗？

translation.B: 第一次！这里真的很不错。

key_phrases: I don't think we've met = 我想我们还没见过（开启对话）
How do you know the host? = 你和主人怎么认识的？（派对破冰常用）
First time! = 第一次！（简洁有力的回答）
tip: 美国社交场合主动打招呼很正常，'I don't think we've met' 是最自然的开场白。
examples: I don't think we've met — I'm Mike.（我想我们还没见过，我是Mike）
How do you know the birthday girl?（你和今天的寿星怎么认识的？）
First time at this bar! It's really cool.（第一次来这个酒吧，真的很棒）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm interested in signing up for a membership.

dialogue.B: Great! We have a few options. Are you looking for just gym access or classes too?

dialogue.A: Probably both. What's the most popular plan?

dialogue.B: Most people go with the All-Access plan — $45 a month.

dialogue.A: Is there a sign-up fee?

dialogue.B: We're waiving it this week, so you'd just pay the monthly rate.

translation.A: 你好，我想办会员。

translation.B: 好的！我们有几个方案。您只需要用健身房还是也想上课？

translation.A: 可能都要。最受欢迎的方案是什么？

translation.B: 大多数人选全能方案，每月45美元。

translation.A: 有入会费吗？

translation.B: 这周我们免收入会费，您只需支付月费。

key_phrases: I'm interested in ~ = 我有兴趣～（表达意向）
Are you looking for ~? = 您是在找～吗？
We're waiving ~ = 我们免收～
tip: 'We're waiving the fee' 意思是免收费用，健身房、银行常用这个说法谈优惠。
examples: I'm interested in signing up for yoga.（我想报名瑜伽课）
Are you looking for morning or evening classes?（您想要早上还是晚上的课？）
We're waiving the enrollment fee this month.（这个月我们免收报名费）

dialogue.A: Thank you for calling Domino's. Is this for delivery or carryout?

dialogue.B: Delivery, please.

dialogue.A: Can I get your address?

dialogue.B: It's 123 Main Street, Apartment 4B.

dialogue.A: And what would you like to order?

dialogue.B: One large pepperoni pizza and a two-liter Coke.

translation.A: 感谢致电Domino's，请问是外送还是自取？

translation.B: 外送，谢谢。

translation.A: 请问您的地址？

translation.B: Main Street 123号，4B公寓。

translation.A: 请问要点什么？

translation.B: 一个大号意式香肠披萨和一瓶两升可乐。

key_phrases: Delivery or carryout? = 外送还是自取？
Apartment 4B = 4B公寓（说地址格式）
Two-liter = 两升装（饮料常用规格）
tip: 美国说公寓门牌号时直接说 'Apartment 4B'，不说 'Room'。
examples: Delivery to 45 Maple Street.（送到Maple Street 45号）
One large veggie pizza, please.（一个大号蔬菜披萨）
How long is the wait for delivery?（外送大概要等多久？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I need to report a maintenance issue in my apartment.

dialogue.B: Sure, what's going on?

dialogue.A: The kitchen faucet is leaking. It's been dripping all night.

dialogue.B: I'll put in a work order. Can we come by tomorrow morning?

dialogue.A: Morning works. I'll be home until noon.

dialogue.B: Perfect. We'll be there between 9 and 11.

translation.A: 你好，我需要报告公寓里的维修问题。

translation.B: 好的，什么情况？

translation.A: 厨房水龙头漏水，滴了一整晚了。

translation.B: 我来提交工单，明天早上可以来吗？

translation.A: 早上可以，我在家到中午。

translation.B: 好的，我们9点到11点之间到。

key_phrases: I need to report a ~ issue = 我需要报告一个～问题
Put in a work order = 提交工单
I'll be home until ~ = 我在家到～点
tip: 租房遇到维修问题要告诉房东/物业 'put in a work order'，这是标准流程说法。
examples: I need to report a broken heater.（我需要报告暖气坏了）
Can I put in a work order for the bathroom?（能帮我提交浴室维修工单吗？）
I'll be home until 3 PM tomorrow.（我明天下午3点前都在家）

dialogue.A: Tell me a little bit about yourself.

dialogue.B: Sure! I have about five years of experience in data analysis, mainly in the retail sector.

dialogue.A: What made you interested in this role?

dialogue.B: I love that this company is data-driven, and I think my background is a strong fit.

dialogue.A: Great. Where do you see yourself in five years?

dialogue.B: I'd love to grow into a team lead role and mentor junior analysts.

translation.A: 请简单介绍一下你自己。

translation.B: 好的！我有大约五年的数据分析经验，主要在零售行业。

translation.A: 是什么让你对这个职位感兴趣？

translation.B: 我很欣赏这家公司以数据驱动，我觉得我的背景非常匹配。

translation.A: 很好。你对未来五年有什么规划？

translation.B: 我希望成长为团队负责人，并指导初级分析师。

key_phrases: Tell me about yourself = 面试最常见的开场问题
Strong fit = 非常匹配
Grow into ~ role = 成长为～的职位
tip: 面试回答 'Tell me about yourself' 时，公式是：过去经历 → 现在技能 → 未来目标，控制在1分钟内。
examples: I have three years of marketing experience.（我有三年市场营销经验）
I think my background is a strong fit for this role.（我觉得我的背景非常匹配这个职位）
I'd love to grow into a leadership position.（我希望成长为管理职位）

dialogue.A: Excuse me, does this bus go to downtown?

dialogue.B: Yes, but you'll need to transfer at Central Station.

dialogue.A: How many stops is that from here?

dialogue.B: About four stops. It's a ten-minute ride.

dialogue.A: Do I pay when I get on?

dialogue.B: Yes, exact change or a transit card. The driver doesn't make change.

translation.A: 打扰一下，这辆公交去市中心吗？

translation.B: 去，但是您需要在中央站换乘。

translation.A: 从这里到那里几站？

translation.B: 大约四站，大概十分钟。

translation.A: 上车时付款吗？

translation.B: 是的，需要零钱或交通卡，司机不找零。

key_phrases: Does this bus go to ~? = 这辆公交去～吗？
Transfer at ~ = 在～换乘
The driver doesn't make change = 司机不找零
tip: 美国很多城市公交不找零，建议提前准备零钱或购买交通卡（Metro Card等）。
examples: Does this bus go to the airport?（这辆公交去机场吗？）
You'll need to transfer at Park Street.（您需要在Park Street换乘）
The driver doesn't make change, so bring exact fare.（司机不找零，请准备好零钱）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'd like to send this package to California.

dialogue.B: Sure. Would you like Priority Mail or regular?

dialogue.A: What's the difference?

dialogue.B: Priority takes 2-3 days, regular is 5-7 days. Priority is $12, regular is $7.

dialogue.A: I'll go with Priority, please.

dialogue.B: Okay, I'll need you to fill out this customs form.

translation.A: 你好，我想把这个包裹寄到加州。

translation.B: 好的。您要优先邮件还是普通邮件？

translation.A: 有什么区别？

translation.B: 优先2-3天，普通5-7天。优先12美元，普通7美元。

translation.A: 我选优先，谢谢。

translation.B: 好的，需要您填一下这张报关单。

key_phrases: I'd like to send this package to ~ = 我想把包裹寄到～
What's the difference? = 有什么区别？（万能问法）
Fill out this form = 填写这张表格
tip: 'What's the difference?' 是日常最实用的问句之一，任何场景都能用。
examples: I'd like to send this to New York.（我想把这个寄到纽约）
What's the difference between the two options?（这两个选项有什么区别？）
Please fill out this customs form.（请填写这张报关单）

dialogue.A: Hey, are you coming to the party Saturday?

dialogue.B: I really wish I could, but I already have plans.

dialogue.A: Aw, that's too bad. What are you up to?

dialogue.B: My parents are visiting from out of town.

dialogue.A: Oh, that's totally understandable. Next time!

dialogue.B: Definitely! Have a great time.

translation.A: 嘿，周六派对你来吗？

translation.B: 真的很想去，但我已经有安排了。

translation.A: 哦太可惜了，你有什么事？

translation.B: 我父母从外地来看我。

translation.A: 哦，完全理解，下次吧！

translation.B: 一定！祝你们玩得开心。

key_phrases: I really wish I could, but ~ = 真的很想，但是～（礼貌婉拒）
I already have plans = 我已经有安排了
From out of town = 从外地来
tip: 婉拒时说 'I really wish I could' 比直接说 'I can't' 更有礼貌，不会让人觉得你不想去。
examples: I really wish I could, but I have a prior commitment.（真的很想去，但我之前有约）
My family is visiting from out of town this weekend.（我家人这周末从外地来）
I already have plans, but let's do it next time!（我已经有安排了，但下次一定！）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'd like to return this jacket.

dialogue.B: Of course. Do you have your receipt?

dialogue.A: Yes, here it is. I bought it last week.

dialogue.B: What's the reason for the return?

dialogue.A: It doesn't fit quite right. Can I exchange it for a larger size?

dialogue.B: Absolutely. Let me check if we have your size in stock.

translation.A: 你好，我想退这件夹克。

translation.B: 当然。您有收据吗？

translation.A: 有，在这里，我上周买的。

translation.B: 请问退货原因是什么？

translation.A: 尺码不太合适，可以换一件大一号的吗？

translation.B: 当然可以，我查一下有没有您的尺码。

key_phrases: I'd like to return/exchange this ~ = 我想退/换这个～
It doesn't fit quite right = 尺码不太合适
In stock = 有库存
tip: 美国大部分商店退货政策很宽松，30天内凭收据基本都能退，不用给太多解释。
examples: I'd like to return this sweater — it shrunk.（我想退这件毛衣，它缩水了）
Do you have a larger size in stock?（有没有大一号的库存？）
Can I exchange it or get store credit?（可以换货或者退成购物券吗？）

dialogue.A: Can you believe this weather?

dialogue.B: I know, it came out of nowhere!

dialogue.A: I didn't even bring an umbrella.

dialogue.B: Here, I have an extra one. Take it.

dialogue.A: Really? That's so kind of you!

dialogue.B: No worries. Looks like it'll clear up by afternoon anyway.

translation.A: 这天气真的难以置信！

translation.B: 可不是，毫无预兆就变了！

translation.A: 我连伞都没带。

translation.B: 来，我有多余的，拿去吧。

translation.A: 真的吗？你太好心了！

translation.B: 没事的。下午看起来会晴开的。

key_phrases: Can you believe this weather? = 这天气真不敢相信！（开启闲聊）
It came out of nowhere = 毫无预兆，突然就来了
Clear up = （天气）放晴
tip: 天气是美国人最爱的小聊话题，'Can you believe this weather?' 是万能开场白。
examples: Can you believe how hot it's been?（这天气热得真不敢相信！）
It came out of nowhere — one minute sunny, next minute raining.（毫无预兆，一会晴一会下雨）
Looks like it'll clear up by evening.（看起来晚上会放晴）

dialogue.A: Hi, I saw the listing online. Is the one-bedroom still available?

dialogue.B: It is! Would you like to schedule a showing?

dialogue.A: Yes, please. What's the monthly rent?

dialogue.B: It's $1,800 a month, utilities not included.

dialogue.A: Is parking included?

dialogue.B: One spot is included. Additional spots are $50 a month.

translation.A: 你好，我在网上看到了这个房源，单卧室还有吗？

translation.B: 有的！您想约时间来看房吗？

translation.A: 好的，请问月租是多少？

translation.B: 每月1800美元，不含水电。

translation.A: 停车位包含在内吗？

translation.B: 包含一个车位，额外车位每月50美元。

key_phrases: Is the ~ still available? = ～还有吗？
Schedule a showing = 预约看房
Utilities not included = 不含水电费
tip: 租房时一定要问清楚 'utilities included or not'（水电是否包含），这会大幅影响实际费用。
examples: Is the two-bedroom still available?（两室一厅还有吗？）
Is parking included in the rent?（停车位包含在租金里吗？）
Are utilities included?（水电费包含在内吗？）

dialogue.A: Excuse me, I think there's a mistake on my bill.

dialogue.B: Let me take a look. What seems to be the issue?

dialogue.A: I was charged twice for the appetizer.

dialogue.B: Oh, you're right. I'm so sorry about that.

dialogue.A: No worries, it happens. Can you fix it?

dialogue.B: Absolutely. I'll have the corrected bill out in a moment.

translation.A: 打扰一下，我觉得账单有误。

translation.B: 我来看一下，是什么问题？

translation.A: 前菜被收了两次费用。

translation.B: 哦，您说得对，非常抱歉。

translation.A: 没关系，这种事难免，能帮我改一下吗？

translation.B: 当然，我马上给您出一张更正后的账单。

key_phrases: I think there's a mistake on my bill = 我觉得账单有误（礼貌投诉）
I was charged twice for ~ = ～被收了两次费用
I'll have ~ out in a moment = 我马上给您～
tip: 投诉时用 'I think' 而不是 'You made a mistake'，语气更平和，对方更愿意帮你解决。
examples: I think there's a mistake — I ordered the salmon, not the steak.（我觉得有误，我点的是三文鱼，不是牛排）
I was charged for a drink I didn't order.（有一杯我没点的饮料被收费了）
I'll have the corrected receipt for you shortly.（我马上给您一张更正后的收据）

dialogue.A: Hey, do you have a minute?

dialogue.B: Sure, what's up?

dialogue.A: I'm stuck on this report. Can you walk me through how you did yours last quarter?

dialogue.B: Of course! Pull up your spreadsheet and I'll show you.

dialogue.A: Thanks so much. I really appreciate it.

dialogue.B: Happy to help. We've all been there!

translation.A: 嘿，你有一分钟吗？

translation.B: 有，什么事？

translation.A: 我在这份报告上卡住了。你能带我过一遍你上季度怎么做的吗？

translation.B: 当然！把你的表格打开，我来演示给你看。

translation.A: 非常感谢，真的很感激。

translation.B: 乐意帮忙，我们都经历过这个！

key_phrases: Do you have a minute? = 你有一分钟吗？（请求帮助的礼貌开场）
I'm stuck on ~ = 我在～上卡住了
We've all been there = 我们都经历过（表达理解和共情）
tip: 'Do you have a minute?' 是办公室最常用的请求帮助开场白，比直接问问题更礼貌。
examples: Hey, do you have a minute to review this?（嘿，你有空帮我看一下这个吗？）
I'm stuck on the budget section.（我在预算部分卡住了）
No worries — we've all been there with this software!（没关系，我们都在这个软件上栽过！）

dialogue.A: 911, what's your emergency?

dialogue.B: My friend fell and hit his head. He's unconscious.

dialogue.A: Okay, I'm sending help. What's your address?

dialogue.B: We're at 456 Oak Avenue, second floor.

dialogue.A: Is he breathing?

dialogue.B: Yes, he is. Please hurry!

translation.A: 911，请说明您的紧急情况。

translation.B: 我朋友摔倒撞到头了，他失去意识了。

translation.A: 好的，我正在派人过去，您的地址是？

translation.B: 我们在Oak大道456号，二楼。

translation.A: 他还在呼吸吗？

translation.B: 有，在呼吸，请快点！

key_phrases: What's your emergency? = 您的紧急情况是什么？（911开场白）
He's unconscious = 他失去意识了
Is he breathing? = 他还在呼吸吗？
tip: 打911要保持冷静，先说清楚发生了什么、在哪里，回答接线员的问题，不要先挂电话。
examples: My neighbor fell down the stairs.（我邻居从楼梯上摔下来了）
She's conscious but in a lot of pain.（她有意识但非常痛）
We're at the corner of Main and 5th.（我们在Main和5th街的路口）

dialogue.A: Here, this is for you. A little thank-you gift.

dialogue.B: Oh wow, you didn't have to do that!

dialogue.A: I wanted to. You really helped me out last month.

dialogue.B: I'm just glad it worked out. Should I open it now?

dialogue.A: Please do!

dialogue.B: Oh, I love it. This is so thoughtful, thank you!

translation.A: 给你，这是给你的，小小的感谢礼物。

translation.B: 哇，你不用这样的！

translation.A: 我想给的，上个月你真的帮了我大忙。

translation.B: 只要结果好就行。我现在可以打开吗？

translation.A: 当然！

translation.B: 哦，我很喜欢，你真的太细心了，谢谢！

key_phrases: You didn't have to do that! = 你不用这样的！（收礼物时的标准反应）
You really helped me out = 你真的帮了我大忙
This is so thoughtful = 你真的太细心/贴心了
tip: 美国人收礼物一般会当场打开，并说 'This is so thoughtful!' 这是最常见的称赞礼物方式。
examples: Here, this is just a small thank-you.（给你，这只是一点小心意）
You really helped me out last week — I can't thank you enough.（你上周真的帮了我大忙，我非常感激）
This is so thoughtful — I love it!（你真的太细心了，我很喜欢！）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm looking to switch carriers. What plans do you have?

dialogue.B: We have three main plans. The unlimited plan is our most popular at $45 a month.

dialogue.A: Does that include international texting?

dialogue.B: Yes, free texts to over 200 countries.

dialogue.A: What about data roaming?

dialogue.B: That's an add-on — $10 a day when you're abroad.

translation.A: 你好，我想换运营商，你们有什么套餐？

translation.B: 我们有三个主要套餐，无限流量套餐最受欢迎，每月45美元。

translation.A: 包含国际短信吗？

translation.B: 包含，可以免费发短信到200多个国家。

translation.A: 国际漫游数据怎么收费？

translation.B: 那是附加服务，在国外每天10美元。

key_phrases: Switch carriers = 换运营商
Unlimited plan = 无限套餐
Add-on = 附加服务/附加费
tip: 'Add-on' 是附加服务的意思，办套餐时要仔细问清楚哪些是包含的，哪些是 add-on 另收费。
examples: I'm thinking of switching to a cheaper plan.（我在考虑换一个便宜一点的套餐）
Does the plan include international calling?（套餐包含国际通话吗？）
Is hotspot included, or is that an add-on?（热点包含在内吗，还是附加服务？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'd like to book a house cleaning service.

dialogue.B: Of course. How large is your home?

dialogue.A: It's a two-bedroom, one-bathroom apartment.

dialogue.B: And is this a one-time clean or recurring?

dialogue.A: One-time for now, but maybe biweekly if I like the service.

dialogue.B: Great. We have availability this Thursday or Saturday.

translation.A: 你好，我想预约家庭保洁服务。

translation.B: 好的，您的房子有多大？

translation.A: 两室一卫的公寓。

translation.B: 这是一次性清洁还是定期的？

translation.A: 目前是一次，如果满意的话可能改为每两周一次。

translation.B: 好的，本周四或周六有空档。

key_phrases: One-time vs recurring = 一次性 vs 定期
Biweekly = 每两周一次
Availability = 空档/可预约时间
tip: 注意：'biweekly' 在美式英语中可以表示'每两周一次'也可以表示'每周两次'，使用时最好说清楚 'every two weeks'。
examples: I'd like to book a deep clean for my apartment.（我想预约公寓深度清洁）
Do you offer biweekly service?（你们有每两周一次的服务吗？）
We have availability this Friday afternoon.（本周五下午有空档）

dialogue.A: Hi, this is Joshua in Apartment 4B. I need to report a noise complaint.

dialogue.B: I'm sorry to hear that. What's going on?

dialogue.A: The neighbors upstairs have been playing loud music since midnight.

dialogue.B: I'll give them a call right away.

dialogue.A: I'd really appreciate that. I have work tomorrow morning.

dialogue.B: Of course. I'll take care of it. Sorry for the trouble.

translation.A: 你好，我是4B公寓的Joshua，我要投诉噪音问题。

translation.B: 很抱歉听到这个，是什么情况？

translation.A: 楼上的邻居从午夜开始一直在大声放音乐。

translation.B: 我马上给他们打电话。

translation.A: 真的非常感谢，我明天早上要上班。

translation.B: 当然，我来处理，给您带来不便很抱歉。

key_phrases: Noise complaint = 噪音投诉
Since midnight = 从午夜开始
I'll take care of it = 我来处理这件事
tip: 投诉时说清楚自己是谁、住在哪里、具体情况，对方才能快速处理。礼貌投诉往往比情绪化更有效。
examples: This is Unit 3A — I need to report a noise complaint.（这里是3A，我要投诉噪音问题）
The music has been going on since 11 PM.（音乐从晚上11点就开始了）
I have work tomorrow — I'd really appreciate your help.（我明天要上班，非常希望您能帮忙处理）

dialogue.A: Hey, are you free this weekend?

dialogue.B: Saturday afternoon should work. What did you have in mind?

dialogue.A: There's a new Marvel movie out. Want to check it out?

dialogue.B: I'm in! What time works for you?

dialogue.A: The 3 o'clock showing?

dialogue.B: Perfect. I'll grab the tickets online.

translation.A: 嘿，这周末有空吗？

translation.B: 周六下午应该可以，你有什么打算？

translation.A: 新的漫威电影上映了，要去看吗？

translation.B: 我去！你什么时候方便？

translation.A: 3点场？

translation.B: 好的，我在网上买票。

key_phrases: What did you have in mind? = 你有什么打算/想法？
I'm in! = 我参加！（表示愿意）
I'll grab the tickets = 我来买票
tip: 'I'm in!' 是非常口语化的表达，意思是'我参加/我同意'，比 'Yes, I want to go' 更地道。
examples: What did you have in mind for tonight?（你今晚有什么打算？）
I'm totally in — sounds like fun!（我完全参加！听起来很有趣！）
I'll grab the popcorn, you get the tickets.（我买爆米花，你买票）

dialogue.A: Is this everything for you?

dialogue.B: Yes, and can I get a pack of gum?

dialogue.A: Which kind?

dialogue.B: Whatever's minty. Also, can I pay with card?

dialogue.A: Minimum $5 for card.

dialogue.B: That's fine, this is over $5.

translation.A: 就这些了吗？

translation.B: 是的，再给我一包口香糖。

translation.A: 要哪种？

translation.B: 薄荷味的就行，还有，可以刷卡吗？

translation.A: 刷卡最低消费5美元。

translation.B: 没问题，这些超过5美元了。

key_phrases: Is this everything for you? = 就这些了吗？（收银常用）
Whatever's minty = 薄荷味的就行（'whatever' 表示随便）
Minimum $5 for card = 刷卡最低消费5美元
tip: 'Whatever works' / 'whatever's fine' 是表示'随便'的地道口语，比 'anything is okay' 更自然。
examples: Is this everything for you today?（今天就这些了吗？）
Whatever's cheapest is fine.（最便宜的就行）
The minimum for card is $10 here.（这里刷卡最低消费10美元）

dialogue.A: Good morning, Dr. Lee's office. How can I help you?

dialogue.B: Hi, I'd like to schedule a cleaning.

dialogue.A: Are you a new or existing patient?

dialogue.B: Existing. My name is Joshua Song.

dialogue.A: Great. We have an opening next Tuesday at 10 AM.

dialogue.B: That works perfectly. See you then!

translation.A: 早上好，Lee医生诊所，请问有什么可以帮您？

translation.B: 你好，我想预约洗牙。

translation.A: 请问是新患者还是老患者？

translation.B: 老患者，我叫Joshua Song。

translation.A: 好的，下周二上午10点有空档。

translation.B: 完美，到时见！

key_phrases: Schedule a cleaning = 预约洗牙
New or existing patient? = 新患者还是老患者？
We have an opening ~ = 我们～有空档
tip: 牙医诊所叫洗牙是 'cleaning'，不叫 'teeth washing'。预约检查叫 'checkup' 或 'exam'。
examples: I'd like to schedule a checkup and cleaning.（我想预约体检和洗牙）
Are you a new patient with us?（您是我们这里的新患者吗？）
We have an opening Thursday at 2 PM.（周四下午2点有空档）

dialogue.A: Hi, pump number 4, please. Fill it up with regular.

dialogue.B: Will that be cash or credit?

dialogue.A: Credit.

dialogue.B: Go ahead and swipe at the pump.

dialogue.A: Oh, the machine's not taking my card.

dialogue.B: Try swiping it again slower. If not, come back in and I'll run it.

translation.A: 你好，4号泵，请加满，普通汽油。

translation.B: 现金还是刷卡？

translation.A: 刷卡。

translation.B: 去泵那边刷卡就可以了。

translation.A: 哦，机器不接受我的卡。

translation.B: 试着慢一点刷，不行的话进来我帮你刷。

key_phrases: Fill it up with regular = 加满，普通汽油
Swipe at the pump = 在加油机上刷卡
Run it = 刷卡/处理付款（口语）
tip: 美国加油站汽油分 Regular（普通）、Mid-grade（中级）、Premium（高级），大多数车用Regular就够了。
examples: Fill it up with premium, please — pump 7.（7号泵，加满高级汽油）
The card reader at the pump isn't working.（泵上的读卡机不工作）
Try inserting it slowly — sometimes that helps.（试试慢慢插入，有时管用）

dialogue.A: Hey, just wanted to follow up on the email I sent last week.

dialogue.B: Oh, I'm so sorry — it got buried in my inbox.

dialogue.A: No worries at all. I was just wondering if you had a chance to review the proposal.

dialogue.B: I'll look at it today, I promise.

dialogue.A: Great, no rush. Just let me know if you have any questions.

dialogue.B: Will do. Thanks for the nudge!

translation.A: 嘿，想跟进一下我上周发的邮件。

translation.B: 哦，真抱歉，被埋在收件箱里了。

translation.A: 完全没关系，只是想问一下你有没有机会看提案。

translation.B: 我今天就看，保证。

translation.A: 好的，不急，有任何问题随时告诉我。

translation.B: 好的！谢谢你提醒！

key_phrases: Just wanted to follow up = 只是想跟进一下（邮件追踪万能句）
It got buried in my inbox = 被埋在收件箱了（解释没回复）
Thanks for the nudge! = 谢谢你提醒！
tip: 'Just wanted to follow up on ~' 是职场中跟进事项最礼貌的说法，不会显得催促。
examples: Just wanted to follow up on our meeting last week.（只是想跟进一下上周我们的会议）
No worries — it got buried in my inbox too.（没关系，我的收件箱里也埋着很多）
Thanks for the nudge — I'll get back to you today.（谢谢提醒，我今天给你回复）

dialogue.A: What can I get you guys?

dialogue.B: I'll have an IPA. What do you have on draft?

dialogue.A: We've got Goose Island, Blue Moon, and a local sour.

dialogue.B: I'll go with the Goose Island.

dialogue.A: And for you?

dialogue.C: Just a sparkling water for me, thanks.

translation.A: 你们要点什么？

translation.B: 我要一杯IPA，你们有哪些生啤？

translation.A: 有Goose Island、Blue Moon和一款本地酸啤。

translation.B: 我要Goose Island。

translation.A: 您呢？

translation.C: 我就要一杯气泡水，谢谢。

key_phrases: What do you have on draft? = 你们有哪些生啤？
I'll go with ~ = 我选～（做决定时常用）
Just a ~ for me = 我就要～（简单点单）
tip: 'I'll go with ~' 是做选择时非常自然的表达，比 'I choose' 或 'I want' 更口语化。
examples: What do you have on tap tonight?（今晚有哪些生啤？）
I'll go with the Blue Moon — sounds good.（我要Blue Moon，听起来不错）
Just a sparkling water for me, thanks.（我就要气泡水，谢谢）

dialogue.A: Hey, are you good with computers? My printer won't connect.

dialogue.B: Let me take a look. Did you try restarting it?

dialogue.A: Yeah, twice.

dialogue.B: Is it showing up in your devices list?

dialogue.A: No, that's the problem.

dialogue.B: Try removing it and re-adding it. Sometimes that fixes it.

translation.A: 嘿，你懂电脑吗？我的打印机连不上。

translation.B: 我来看看，你重启过吗？

translation.A: 重启过，两次了。

translation.B: 设备列表里能看到它吗？

translation.A: 看不到，这就是问题所在。

translation.B: 试试先删除再重新添加，有时候这样能解决。

key_phrases: Are you good with computers? = 你懂电脑吗？
Let me take a look = 我来看看（主动帮忙）
That fixes it = 这样能解决（it指问题）
tip: 'Are you good with ~?' 是问某人是否擅长某事的地道说法，比 'Do you know about ~?' 更自然。
examples: Are you good with Excel? I'm totally lost.（你会Excel吗？我完全搞不懂）
Did you try restarting the app?（你试过重启应用吗？）
Try deleting it and reinstalling — that usually fixes it.（试试删掉重装，通常能解决）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm checking in for my flight to Miami.

dialogue.B: Passport and booking reference, please.

dialogue.A: Here you go. I have one bag to check.

dialogue.B: Go ahead and place it on the scale. It's 52 pounds — that's over the limit.

dialogue.A: Oh no. What's the overweight fee?

dialogue.B: $75 for bags over 50 pounds.

translation.A: 你好，我要办理去迈阿密的登机手续。

translation.B: 请出示护照和订单号。

translation.A: 给您，我有一件托运行李。

translation.B: 放到秤上来，52磅——超重了。

translation.A: 哦不，超重费是多少？

translation.B: 超过50磅的行李收75美元。

key_phrases: Checking in for my flight to ~ = 办理去～的登机手续
Bag to check = 要托运的行李
Overweight fee = 超重费
tip: 美国航空公司托运行李通常限重50磅（约22.7公斤），超重费很贵，出发前最好在家称好。
examples: I'm checking in for my flight to Seattle.（我要办理去西雅图的登机手续）
I have two bags to check.（我有两件托运行李）
The bag is 53 pounds — is there an overweight fee?（行李53磅，有超重费吗？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I wanted to talk about renewing my lease.

dialogue.B: Sure! Your current lease ends July 31st. Are you looking to stay?

dialogue.A: Yes, I love it here. Will the rent be going up?

dialogue.B: We're planning a 5% increase. That would be $1,890.

dialogue.A: Is there any flexibility on that?

dialogue.B: If you sign a two-year lease, I can keep it at $1,800.

translation.A: 你好，我想谈谈续租的事。

translation.B: 当然！您的租约7月31日到期，您打算继续住吗？

translation.A: 是的，我很喜欢这里。租金会涨吗？

translation.B: 我们计划涨5%，就是1890美元。

translation.A: 有商量的余地吗？

translation.B: 如果您签两年租约，我可以保持1800美元不变。

key_phrases: Renewing my lease = 续租
Is there any flexibility on that? = 有商量的余地吗？（价格谈判万能句）
Sign a two-year lease = 签两年租约
tip: 'Is there any flexibility on that?' 是谈价格时最礼貌有效的问法，适用于租房、购物、谈薪水等场景。
examples: I'd love to renew for another year.（我想再续租一年）
Is there any flexibility on the rent increase?（租金涨幅有商量的余地吗？）
If I sign a two-year lease, can we lock in the current rate?（如果我签两年，可以锁定现在的租金吗？）

dialogue.A: Hey, I heard the news — congratulations on the promotion!

dialogue.B: Thank you so much! I'm still in shock, honestly.

dialogue.A: You deserve it. You've worked so hard this year.

dialogue.B: That means a lot coming from you.

dialogue.A: We should celebrate. Drinks after work?

dialogue.B: I'd love that! Let's do it!

translation.A: 嘿，我听说了，恭喜你升职！

translation.B: 非常感谢！说实话我还有点惊讶。

translation.A: 你应得的，你今年真的很努力。

translation.B: 从你嘴里听到这话真的很有意义。

translation.A: 我们应该庆祝一下，下班后去喝一杯？

translation.B: 当然好！走起！

key_phrases: Congratulations on ~ = 恭喜你～（具体事情）
You deserve it = 你应得的
That means a lot coming from you = 从你嘴里听到这话很有意义
tip: 'That means a lot coming from you' 是表达感谢时特别有温度的一句话，说明对方的认可对你很重要。
examples: Congratulations on the new baby!（恭喜你们迎来新宝宝！）
That's amazing news — you deserve this!（太棒了，你应得的！）
Drinks on me to celebrate!（我请客庆祝！）

dialogue.A: Hi, I have an appointment for my dog, Max.

dialogue.B: What's Max coming in for today?

dialogue.A: Annual shots and a checkup.

dialogue.B: Has he had any changes in eating or behavior lately?

dialogue.A: He's been scratching a lot more than usual.

dialogue.B: We'll take a look at his skin too. Please have a seat.

translation.A: 你好，我给我的狗Max预约了。

translation.B: Max今天来是为了什么？

translation.A: 年度疫苗和体检。

translation.B: 他最近饮食或行为有变化吗？

translation.A: 他最近挠痒痒比平时多很多。

translation.B: 我们也会检查他的皮肤，请先坐。

key_phrases: Annual shots = 年度疫苗
Changes in eating or behavior = 饮食或行为变化
Scratching more than usual = 比平时挠得多
tip: 去宠物医院前想好要描述的症状，用 'more than usual'（比平时多/少）来量化很有帮助。
examples: I have an appointment for my cat, Luna.（我给我的猫Luna预约了）
She's been eating less than usual.（她最近吃得比平时少）
Any changes in behavior recently?（最近行为有什么变化吗？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'd like to sign up for the adult swimming class.

dialogue.B: Great! Are you a beginner or do you have some experience?

dialogue.A: I can swim a little, but I want to improve my technique.

dialogue.B: Then the Intermediate class would be perfect. It starts June 10th.

dialogue.A: How many sessions is it?

dialogue.B: Eight sessions, every Tuesday evening.

translation.A: 你好，我想报名成人游泳课。

translation.B: 好的！您是初学者还是有一些基础？

translation.A: 我会一点，但想提高技术。

translation.B: 那中级班很适合您，6月10日开始。

translation.A: 一共有几节课？

translation.B: 八节课，每周二晚上。

key_phrases: Sign up for ~ = 报名参加～
I want to improve my ~ = 我想提高我的～
How many sessions? = 一共几节课/几场？
tip: 报名课程时问清楚 'How many sessions?' 和 'When does it start?' 是两个最重要的问题。
examples: I'd like to sign up for the beginner pottery class.（我想报名初级陶艺课）
I have some experience, so I'd like intermediate.（我有一些基础，想上中级班）
How many sessions does the course include?（这个课程包含几节课？）

dialogue.A: Hey, can you hear me? My video keeps freezing.

dialogue.B: You're breaking up a bit. Try turning off your camera.

dialogue.A: Better?

dialogue.B: Yes, much better. Also, you might want to move closer to your router.

dialogue.A: Good idea. Sorry about the connection issues.

dialogue.B: No worries, happens to all of us.

translation.A: 嘿，你能听到我吗？我的视频一直卡。

translation.B: 你有点断断续续，试着关掉摄像头。

translation.A: 好一点了吗？

translation.B: 好多了，你也可以试着靠近路由器。

translation.A: 好主意，网络问题抱歉了。

translation.B: 没关系，大家都遇到过这种情况。

key_phrases: You're breaking up = 你的声音/画面断断续续
Try turning off your camera = 试着关掉摄像头
Move closer to your router = 靠近路由器
tip: 视频会议中说 'You're breaking up' 表示对方信号不好，比 'Your connection is bad' 更口语。
examples: Can everyone hear me okay?（大家都能听到我吗？）
You're breaking up — can you move closer to the router?（你断断续续，能靠近路由器一点吗？）
Try turning off your video to help the connection.（试着关掉视频，帮助改善网络）

dialogue.A: Thanks for coming! Can I get you something to drink?

dialogue.B: Sure, water would be great. The kids are having so much fun!

dialogue.A: Right? How old is yours turning?

dialogue.B: She's turning six. Yours?

dialogue.A: He's seven today. They grow up so fast!

dialogue.B: Tell me about it! Feels like yesterday he was born.

translation.A: 谢谢来参加！给你拿点喝的吗？

translation.B: 好的，水就好，孩子们玩得真开心！

translation.A: 是啊，你家小朋友今天几岁？

translation.B: 她六岁了，你家的呢？

translation.A: 他今天七岁，孩子长得真快！

translation.B: 可不是！感觉就像昨天才出生一样。

key_phrases: Can I get you something to drink? = 给你拿点喝的吗？（待客常用）
She's turning six = 她（快/就要）六岁了
Tell me about it! = 可不是！（强烈认同）
tip: 'Tell me about it!' 不是让别人告诉你什么，而是表示'我太有共鸣了/可不是嘛！'，是地道的认同感叹。
examples: Thanks so much for coming — can I get you a drink?（太感谢你来了，给你拿杯喝的？）
Your daughter is turning five already? Time flies!（你女儿已经5岁了？时间过得真快！）
Tell me about it — feels like yesterday!（可不是，感觉就像昨天！）

dialogue.A: Welcome! Here are your keys — two sets.

dialogue.B: Thank you! Quick question: where do I put my trash?

dialogue.A: There's a trash room on each floor at the end of the hallway.

dialogue.B: And what about recycling?

dialogue.A: Same room. Blue bins for recycling, green for compost.

dialogue.B: Got it. And is there a package room?

translation.A: 欢迎！这是你的钥匙，两套。

translation.B: 谢谢！快问一下，垃圾放哪里？

translation.A: 每层走廊尽头都有一个垃圾间。

translation.B: 回收垃圾呢？

translation.A: 同一个房间，蓝色桶是回收，绿色是堆肥。

translation.B: 明白了，有包裹室吗？

key_phrases: Quick question: ~ = 快问一下～（常用开场白）
At the end of the hallway = 在走廊尽头
Package room = 包裹室（放快递的地方）
tip: 'Quick question' 是礼貌提问的开场白，暗示你的问题不复杂，对方不用花太多时间。
examples: Quick question — where's the laundry room?（快问一下，洗衣房在哪？）
The trash room is at the end of the hall on the right.（垃圾间在走廊右边尽头）
Is there a package room for deliveries?（有存放快递的包裹室吗？）

dialogue.A: Are you ready to order?

dialogue.B: Yes, but I have a nut allergy. Is the pad thai made with peanuts?

dialogue.A: It does have peanuts on top, but we can leave those off.

dialogue.B: Can you make sure the sauce doesn't have any peanut products?

dialogue.A: I'll check with the kitchen and let you know.

dialogue.B: Thank you, I really appreciate that.

translation.A: 您准备好点餐了吗？

translation.B: 准备好了，但我对坚果过敏，泰式炒面有花生吗？

translation.A: 上面有花生，但可以不加。

translation.B: 能确保酱汁里没有任何花生成分吗？

translation.A: 我去问一下厨房再告诉您。

translation.B: 谢谢，真的很感激。

key_phrases: I have a ~ allergy = 我对～过敏
Can you make sure ~? = 能确保～吗？
I'll check with the kitchen = 我去问一下厨房
tip: 有食物过敏一定要在点餐时明确告知，说 'I have a severe allergy'（严重过敏）可以让服务员更认真对待。
examples: I have a gluten allergy — is the pasta gluten-free?（我对麸质过敏，意面是无麸质的吗？）
Can you make sure there's no shellfish in the dish?（能确保菜里没有贝类吗？）
I'll check with the kitchen to be safe.（为安全起见，我去问一下厨房）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm calling about a missing package.

dialogue.B: I'm sorry to hear that. Can I get your order number?

dialogue.A: It's 74829-B. The tracking says delivered, but it's not here.

dialogue.B: Let me look into that. Did you check with your neighbors?

dialogue.A: Yes, no one has it.

dialogue.B: We'll open an investigation and get back to you within 24 hours.

translation.A: 你好，我打电话是关于一个丢失的包裹。

translation.B: 很抱歉听到这个，可以告诉我您的订单号吗？

translation.A: 是74829-B，追踪显示已送达，但我没收到。

translation.B: 我来查一下，您问过邻居了吗？

translation.A: 问过了，没有人有。

translation.B: 我们会发起调查，24小时内给您回复。

key_phrases: Missing package = 丢失的包裹
The tracking says delivered = 追踪显示已送达
Open an investigation = 发起调查
tip: 快递丢失时，先查追踪记录，再问邻居，最后联系卖家/快递公司，提供订单号会大大加快处理速度。
examples: I'm calling about a missing package — order number 98321.（我打电话关于丢失包裹，订单号98321）
The tracking says it was delivered two days ago.（追踪显示两天前已送达）
We'll open an investigation and follow up within 48 hours.（我们会发起调查，48小时内跟进）

dialogue.A: Hey, I just wanted to let you know I'm not feeling well today.

dialogue.B: Oh no, what's going on?

dialogue.A: I woke up with a fever and a sore throat. I think it's best I stay home.

dialogue.B: Of course, take care of yourself. Anything urgent we should cover for you?

dialogue.A: Just the 2 PM client call — could you take that?

dialogue.B: No problem. Feel better soon!

translation.A: 嘿，我想告诉你我今天身体不舒服。

translation.B: 哦不，怎么了？

translation.A: 我醒来就发烧喉咙痛，我觉得还是在家比较好。

translation.B: 当然，注意休息，有什么紧急的需要我们帮你处理吗？

translation.A: 只有下午2点的客户电话，你能代接吗？

translation.B: 没问题，早日康复！

key_phrases: I'm not feeling well = 我身体不舒服（请假开场白）
It's best I stay home = 我觉得还是在家比较好
Feel better soon! = 早日康复！
tip: 美国职场文化中，生病请假是正常且被鼓励的，不用过度道歉，简单说清楚情况即可。
examples: Hey, I'm not feeling well — I'm going to work from home today.（嘿，我身体不舒服，今天在家办公）
I woke up with a fever, so it's best I stay home.（我醒来就发烧了，还是在家好）
Is there anything urgent I should handle from home?（有什么紧急的我可以在家处理吗？）

dialogue.A: Hi, I'm here for the plumbing repair.

dialogue.B: Thanks for coming so quickly! The kitchen sink is completely clogged.

dialogue.A: Let me take a look. Have you tried any drain cleaner?

dialogue.B: Yes, but it didn't help.

dialogue.A: I'll need to use a snake to clear it out. Should take about 30 minutes.

dialogue.B: That's fine. Can I stay and watch?

translation.A: 你好，我是来修水管的。

translation.B: 谢谢你来得这么快！厨房水槽完全堵了。

translation.A: 我来看看，你用过疏通剂吗？

translation.B: 用过，但没用。

translation.A: 我需要用通管器疏通，大概30分钟。

translation.B: 没问题，我可以在旁边看吗？

key_phrases: Completely clogged = 完全堵塞了
Drain cleaner = 管道疏通剂
Use a snake = 用通管器（plumber's snake）
tip: 水管堵塞叫 'clogged'，修水管的工人叫 'plumber'，紧急水管维修可以搜索 'emergency plumber'。
examples: Hi, I'm here for the electrical repair.（你好，我是来修电路的）
The bathroom drain is completely clogged.（浴室排水完全堵塞了）
It should take about 45 minutes to fix.（大概需要45分钟修好）

dialogue.A: We should really take a vacation this summer.

dialogue.B: Agreed! Where are you thinking?

dialogue.A: Maybe the beach? I've always wanted to go to the Outer Banks.

dialogue.B: That sounds amazing. How long were you thinking?

dialogue.A: A week would be perfect. We could rent a house.

dialogue.B: Let's start looking at dates. July works for me.

translation.A: 今年夏天我们真的应该去度假。

translation.B: 同意！你在想哪里？

translation.A: 也许去海边？我一直想去Outer Banks。

translation.B: 听起来很棒，你想去多久？

translation.A: 一周就完美了，我们可以租一栋房子。

translation.B: 我们来定日期吧，七月我可以。

key_phrases: Where are you thinking? = 你在想去哪里？
How long were you thinking? = 你想去多久？
Start looking at dates = 开始看日期/定日期
tip: 美国人度假常说 'rent a house' 通过Airbnb/VRBO订整栋房子，比住酒店便宜，适合多人出行。
examples: Where are you thinking for the trip?（你在想去哪里旅行？）
A week in Costa Rica sounds amazing.（去哥斯达黎加一周听起来很棒）
Let's start looking at flights for July.（我们开始找七月的机票吧）

dialogue.A: Hi, what are we doing today?

dialogue.B: Just a trim, please. About an inch off the top.

dialogue.A: And the sides?

dialogue.B: Keep it the same length on the sides, just clean it up.

dialogue.A: Got it. Any specific style you're going for?

dialogue.B: Nothing too dramatic. Just neat and professional.

translation.A: 你好，今天要怎么剪？

translation.B: 只是修剪一下，顶部剪掉大约一英寸。

translation.A: 两侧呢？

translation.B: 两侧保持同样长度，整理干净就好。

translation.A: 明白了，有什么特别想要的风格吗？

translation.B: 不要太大的变化，整洁、专业就行。

key_phrases: Just a trim = 只是修剪一下
About an inch off = 剪掉大约一英寸
Clean it up = 整理干净
Nothing too dramatic = 不要太大的变化
tip: 'Just a trim' 是最常见的理发说法，意思是稍微剪短，不要大改变。
examples: Just a trim — nothing too dramatic.（只是修剪，不要太大变化）
About half an inch off, please.（请剪掉大约半英寸）
Can you just clean up the sides?（两侧帮我整理干净就好吗？）

dialogue.A: I think we should go with Option A for the launch.

dialogue.B: I see your point, but I'm a little concerned about the timeline.

dialogue.A: What's your worry?

dialogue.B: Option A needs two more weeks of testing. We might miss the deadline.

dialogue.A: That's a fair point. What do you suggest?

dialogue.B: Maybe we go with Option B now and revisit A next quarter.

translation.A: 我觉得我们应该选方案A来上线。

translation.B: 我明白你的意思，但我有点担心时间线。

translation.A: 你担心什么？

translation.B: 方案A还需要两周测试，我们可能会错过截止日期。

translation.A: 这是个合理的观点，你有什么建议？

translation.B: 也许现在先用方案B，下季度再来考虑A。

key_phrases: I see your point, but ~ = 我明白你的意思，但是～（礼貌提出异议）
That's a fair point = 这是个合理的观点（认可对方）
Revisit ~ next quarter = 下季度再来讨论～
tip: 'I see your point, but...' 是职场中最专业的反驳开场白，先认可再提出异议，避免直接冲突。
examples: I see your point, but I'm worried about the cost.（我明白你的意思，但我担心费用）
That's a fair point — I hadn't thought of that.（这是个合理的观点，我没想到这个）
Maybe we table this and revisit next week?（也许我们先搁置，下周再来讨论？）

dialogue.A: Your dog is adorable! What breed is he?

dialogue.B: He's a golden mix. His name is Mochi.

dialogue.A: How old is he?

dialogue.B: About two years. Is yours a corgi?

dialogue.A: Yes! Her name is Daisy. They seem to like each other!

dialogue.B: They do! Do you come here often?

translation.A: 你的狗好可爱！它是什么品种？

translation.B: 它是金毛混血，名字叫Mochi。

translation.A: 它几岁了？

translation.B: 大概两岁，你家的是柯基吗？

translation.A: 对！她叫Daisy，它们好像挺投缘的！

translation.B: 确实！你常来这里吗？

key_phrases: What breed is he/she? = 它是什么品种？
A golden mix = 金毛混血
Do you come here often? = 你常来这里吗？（建立熟识的问法）
tip: 遛狗是美国社区最自然的社交场景，狗狗相互认识了，主人之间的对话就很自然了。
examples: What breed is your dog? She's so cute!（你的狗是什么品种？好可爱！）
He's a husky mix — about three years old.（他是哈士奇混血，大概三岁）
They seem to really like each other — do you come here often?（它们好像很投缘，你常来这里吗？）

dialogue.A: Hi, are you still open?

dialogue.B: We close in about 20 minutes, at 9 PM.

dialogue.A: Perfect. And what time do you open tomorrow?

dialogue.B: We open at 10 AM on Sundays.

dialogue.A: Is that the same on holidays?

dialogue.B: We have reduced hours on holidays — usually noon to 6.

translation.A: 你好，你们还开着吗？

translation.B: 我们大概20分钟后关门，晚上9点。

translation.A: 好的，明天几点开门？

translation.B: 周日早上10点开。

translation.A: 节假日也是一样吗？

translation.B: 节假日营业时间缩短，通常是中午到6点。

key_phrases: Are you still open? = 你们还开着吗？
We close in ~ minutes = 我们～分钟后关门
Reduced hours = 缩短的营业时间
tip: 美国节假日很多商店会有 'holiday hours'，最好提前查一下，免得扑空。
examples: Are you still open? I know it's late.（你们还开着吗？我知道很晚了）
We close in ten minutes, but come on in.（我们十分钟后关门，但进来吧）
Do you have holiday hours posted somewhere?（你们的节假日营业时间贴在哪里了吗？）

dialogue.A: Professor, do you have a moment after class?

dialogue.B: Sure, what's on your mind?

dialogue.A: I'm struggling with the last assignment. I'm not sure I understood the prompt.

dialogue.B: Let's take a look at it together. What part confused you?

dialogue.A: The second question — I wasn't sure what 'contextualize' meant in this case.

dialogue.B: Good question. It means...

translation.A: 教授，下课后您有空吗？

translation.B: 有，什么事？

translation.A: 我在最后的作业上遇到了困难，不太理解题目要求。

translation.B: 我们一起来看看，哪部分让你困惑了？

translation.A: 第二题，我不太确定在这里'contextualize'是什么意思。

translation.B: 好问题，它的意思是……

key_phrases: Do you have a moment? = 您有空吗？（礼貌请求时间）
I'm struggling with ~ = 我在～上遇到困难
I wasn't sure what ~ meant = 我不确定～是什么意思
tip: 主动找老师/教授提问在美国学术文化中非常被鼓励，说明你认真学习，不会被认为是打扰。
examples: Professor, do you have a moment after class?（教授，下课后您有空吗？）
I'm really struggling with Chapter 4.（我在第四章上真的很吃力）
I wasn't sure what 'empirical' meant in that context.（我不确定那个语境里'empirical'是什么意思）

dialogue.A: Excuse me, is it okay to park here?

dialogue.B: There's a 2-hour limit on weekdays. See the sign?

dialogue.A: Oh, I didn't notice. What about weekends?

dialogue.B: Weekends are free parking, no limit.

dialogue.A: Perfect. Is there a meter I need to pay?

dialogue.B: No meter here, but download the ParkMobile app just in case.

translation.A: 打扰一下，这里可以停车吗？

translation.B: 工作日有2小时限制，看到那个牌子了吗？

translation.A: 哦，我没注意到，周末呢？

translation.B: 周末免费停车，没有限制。

translation.A: 好的，需要投币吗？

translation.B: 这里没有停车表，但以防万一可以下载ParkMobile app。

key_phrases: Is it okay to park here? = 这里可以停车吗？
2-hour limit = 2小时停车限制
Just in case = 以防万一
tip: 美国很多城市用ParkMobile或PayByPhone app缴停车费，比找零钱更方便，出行前可以提前下载。
examples: Is it okay to park here after 6 PM?（晚上6点后这里可以停车吗？）
There's a two-hour limit on weekdays only.（只有工作日有两小时限制）
I'll download the app just in case.（我下载这个app以防万一）

dialogue.A: Hey! I made too much chili — want some?

dialogue.B: That's so thoughtful of you! I'd love some.

dialogue.A: Here, take the whole container. I have more than I can eat.

dialogue.B: Are you sure? This smells amazing.

dialogue.A: Of course! Just return the container whenever.

dialogue.B: I'll bring it back tomorrow. Thank you so much!

translation.A: 嘿！我做了太多辣肉酱，要来一些吗？

translation.B: 你真的太贴心了！我当然要！

translation.A: 拿着，把这整个容器都带走吧，我吃不完。

translation.B: 你确定吗？闻起来好香。

translation.A: 当然！容器随时还我就好。

translation.B: 我明天送回来，太感谢了！

key_phrases: I made too much ~ = 我做了太多～
More than I can eat = 多过我能吃的量
Return it whenever = 随时还我就行
tip: 美国邻里间分享食物是常见的友善之举，收到时说 'That's so thoughtful!' 是最合适的回应。
examples: I made too much soup — want some for dinner?（我做了太多汤，晚饭要来一些吗？）
Take the whole pot — I have way more than I can eat.（把整锅带走，我真的吃不完）
I'll return the container this weekend, thank you!（我周末还给你容器，谢谢！）

dialogue.A: Please fill out this form completely.

dialogue.B: Sure. For 'emergency contact,' can I put a family member?

dialogue.A: Yes, someone we can reach if we can't get ahold of you.

dialogue.B: Got it. And for 'primary care physician' — I don't have one yet.

dialogue.A: Just write 'N/A' for now.

dialogue.B: Okay. And where do I sign?

translation.A: 请填写完整这张表格。

translation.B: 好的，'紧急联系人'可以填家人吗？

translation.A: 可以，就是联系不上您时我们能联络的人。

translation.B: 明白了，'主治医生'这栏——我现在还没有。

translation.A: 暂时写'N/A'就可以。

translation.B: 好的，在哪里签名？

key_phrases: Emergency contact = 紧急联系人
Get ahold of you = 联系到您
Primary care physician = 主治医生/家庭医生
N/A (Not Applicable) = 不适用
tip: 美国表格中 'N/A' 是非常常用的填写方式，表示'不适用'或'暂无'，不要空着不填。
examples: Do I put my full legal name here?（这里填我的全名吗？）
For emergency contact, can I put a friend?（紧急联系人可以填朋友吗？）
I don't have a primary doctor yet — should I write N/A?（我还没有主治医生，写N/A可以吗？）

dialogue.A: Are you eating at your desk again?

dialogue.B: Yeah, I have a deadline this afternoon.

dialogue.A: You should take a real break. It's good for your brain.

dialogue.B: You're probably right. Where are you headed?

dialogue.A: There's a new Thai place around the corner. Come join us!

dialogue.B: Okay, five minutes. Let me just send this email.

translation.A: 你又在座位上吃饭？

translation.B: 对，今天下午有个截止日期。

translation.A: 你应该好好休息一下，对大脑有好处。

translation.B: 你说得可能对，你要去哪里？

translation.A: 转角有一家新的泰国餐厅，来跟我们一起去吧！

translation.B: 好的，五分钟，让我把这封邮件发完。

key_phrases: Eating at your desk = 在座位上吃饭
I have a deadline = 我有截止日期
Around the corner = 就在转角/附近
tip: 'Around the corner' 字面意思是'转角处'，但常用来表示'就在附近'，不一定真的在转角。
examples: Are you eating at your desk again? Come eat with us!（你又在座位上吃饭？来跟我们一起吃！）
There's a new ramen place around the corner.（转角有一家新的拉面店）
Just give me five minutes to finish this email.（给我五分钟把这封邮件发完）

dialogue.A: It's getting late. I should head out.

dialogue.B: Already? The night's still young!

dialogue.A: I have an early morning tomorrow. It was so great seeing you.

dialogue.B: You too! Let's not wait so long next time.

dialogue.A: Agreed! Drive safe.

dialogue.B: You too. Text me when you get home!

translation.A: 不早了，我该走了。

translation.B: 这就走？夜还长着呢！

translation.A: 我明天一早有事，见到你真的很开心。

translation.B: 我也是！下次别等这么久了。

translation.A: 同意！开车小心。

translation.B: 你也是，到家发消息给我！

key_phrases: I should head out = 我该走了
The night's still young! = 夜还长呢！（留客套话）
Let's not wait so long next time = 下次别等这么久了
Text me when you get home = 到家发消息给我
tip: 'Text me when you get home' 是美国朋友间非常常见的道别语，表达关心，不是命令。
examples: It's getting late — I should really head out.（不早了，我真的该走了）
Text me when you get home, okay?（到家发消息给我，好吗？）
Let's not wait six months to do this again!（我们别再等六个月才聚了！）
